name: KnowledgeNote
description: Atomic knowledge note — the building block of team-wide institutional memory. Notes have typed content, structured links, lifecycle states, and provenance tracking.

global.schema:
enum NoteStatus {
    DRAFT
    IN_REVIEW
    CANONICAL
    ARCHIVED
}

enum SourceOrigin {
    MANUAL
    SESSION_MINE
    IMPORT
    DERIVED
}

enum LinkType {
    RELATES_TO
    BUILDS_ON
    CONTRADICTS
    SUPERSEDES
    DERIVED_FROM
}

type KnowledgeNoteState {
    title: String
    description: String
    noteType: String
    content: String
    status: NoteStatus
    provenance: Provenance
    links: [NoteLink!]!
    topics: [Topic!]!
    scope: String
    confidence: String
    severity: String
    editor: String
    models: [String!]!
    hooksUsed: [String!]!
    dispatchTargets: [String!]!
    modelId: String
    modules: [String!]!
    version: String
    filePath: String
    computes: String
    inputs: [String!]!
    outputs: [String!]!
    consumedBy: [String!]!
    context: String
    alternatives: [String!]!
    consequences: [String!]!
    decisionStatus: String
    model: String
    sourceType: String
    targetType: String
    relationType: String
    cardinality: String
    errorMessage: String
    rootCause: String
    correctPattern: String
    lifecycleEvents: [LifecycleEvent!]!
}

type Provenance {
    author: String
    sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin
    sessionId: String
    createdAt: DateTime
    updatedAt: DateTime
}

type NoteLink {
    id: OID!
    targetDocumentId: String
    targetTitle: String
    linkType: LinkType
}

type Topic {
    id: OID!
    name: String!
    topicDocumentId: String
}

type LifecycleEvent {
    id: OID!
    fromStatus: NoteStatus
    toStatus: NoteStatus
    actor: String
    timestamp: DateTime
    comment: String
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "title": null,
    "description": null,
    "noteType": null,
    "content": null,
    "status": "DRAFT",
    "provenance": null,
    "links": [],
    "topics": [],
    "scope": null,
    "confidence": null,
    "severity": null,
    "editor": null,
    "models": [],
    "hooksUsed": [],
    "dispatchTargets": [],
    "modelId": null,
    "modules": [],
    "version": null,
    "filePath": null,
    "computes": null,
    "inputs": [],
    "outputs": [],
    "consumedBy": [],
    "context": null,
    "alternatives": [],
    "consequences": [],
    "decisionStatus": null,
    "model": null,
    "sourceType": null,
    "targetType": null,
    "relationType": null,
    "cardinality": null,
    "errorMessage": null,
    "rootCause": null,
    "correctPattern": null,
    "lifecycleEvents": []
}

operations.name: SET_TITLE
SET_DESCRIPTION
SET_NOTE_TYPE
operations.description: Set or change the note type
operations.template: Set or change the note type

operations.name: SET_CONTENT
PATCH_CONTENT
SET_METADATA_FIELD
operations.description: Set any string metadata field by name
operations.template: Set any string metadata field by name

errors.name: InvalidMetadataFieldError
errors.description: Field name is not a recognized string metadata field

operations.name: SET_METADATA_LIST_FIELD
operations.description: Set any string-array metadata field by name
operations.template: Set any string-array metadata field by name

errors.name: InvalidMetadataListFieldError
errors.description: Field name is not a recognized list metadata field

operations.name: SET_PROVENANCE
operations.description: Record author, source origin, session ID, and creation timestamp
operations.template: Record author, source origin, session ID, and creation timestamp

operations.name: ADD_LINK
operations.description: Create a typed link to another note
operations.template: Create a typed link to another note

errors.name: DuplicateLinkIdError
errors.description: A link with this OID already exists

operations.name: REMOVE_LINK
UPDATE_LINK_TYPE
ADD_TOPIC
operations.description: Tag the note with a topic
operations.template: Tag the note with a topic

errors.name: DuplicateTopicError
errors.description: A topic with this name already exists on this note

operations.name: REMOVE_TOPIC
operations.description: Remove a topic tag by ID
operations.template: Remove a topic tag by ID

operations.name: SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Current status doesn't allow this transition

operations.name: APPROVE_NOTE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Current status doesn't allow this transition

errors.name: SelfApprovalError
errors.description: Actor cannot approve their own note

operations.name: REJECT_NOTE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Current status doesn't allow this transition

operations.name: ARCHIVE_NOTE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Current status doesn't allow this transition

operations.name: RESTORE_NOTE

errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError
errors.description: Current status doesn't allow this transition
